sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41496" key="e)piferh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιφερής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n41496.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prone,</tr_> Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρωλύθιον.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
